inline_comments.message: This new figure was obtained by looking at logs of build failures on https://jenkins.nordix.org/job/onap-cps-master-verify-java/ - the highest value I saw was 2032ms. Old value of 1100ms is causing ~90% of Nordix builds to fail.

about 10 times lower than before?!
I know the parsercode has changed for a long time, so we either have much more variation then previously thought or Nordix CI is running with other resources then before.
I am OK with it for now but it is important to remember this when we have new performance issue in other areas....
